ayahEnglish: Who will inherit al-Firdaus. They will abide therein eternally.

ayahEnglish: Then We placed him as a sperm-drop in a firm lodging [i.e., the womb].

targetTranslation: we created (subject of creating عَلَقَةً/a clinging thing)

ayahEnglish: Then We made the sperm-drop into a clinging clot, and We made the clot into a lump [of flesh], and We made [from] the lump, bones, and We covered the bones with flesh; then We developed him into another creation. So blessed is Allāh, the best of creators.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعَ طَرَآئِقَ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ ٱلْخَلْقِ غٰفِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعَ طَرَآئِقَ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ ٱلْخَلْقِ غٰفِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware.

targetTranslation: water (object of أَنزَلْنَا - We sent down)
ayahArabic: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَسْكَنَّاهُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ ذَهَابٍۭ بِهِۦ لَقٰدِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth. And indeed, We are Able to take it away.

ayahArabic: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَسْكَنَّاهُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ ذَهَابٍۭ بِهِۦ لَقٰدِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth. And indeed, We are Able to take it away.

ayahArabic: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِۦ جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.

ayahArabic: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِۦ جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.

ayahArabic: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِۦ جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.

ayahArabic: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِۦ جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.

ayahArabic: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِۦ جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.

ayahArabic: وَشَجَرَةً تَخْرُجُ مِن طُورِ سَيْنَآءَ تَنۢبُتُ بِٱلدُّهْنِ وَصِبْغٍ لِّلْءَاكِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [We brought forth] a tree issuing from Mount Sinai which produces oil and food [i.e., olives] for those who eat.

ayahArabic: وَشَجَرَةً تَخْرُجُ مِن طُورِ سَيْنَآءَ تَنۢبُتُ بِٱلدُّهْنِ وَصِبْغٍ لِّلْءَاكِلِينَ

targetTranslation: we give drink to you all (referring to the livestock mentioned in the ayah)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَنْعٰمِ لَعِبْرَةً نُّسْقِيكُم مِّمَّا فِى بُطُونِهَا وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for you in livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from that which is in their bellies, and for you in them are numerous benefits, and from them you eat.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَنْعٰمِ لَعِبْرَةً نُّسْقِيكُم مِّمَّا فِى بُطُونِهَا وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ

targetTranslation: you (all) are carried (on ships and animals)
ayahArabic: وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And upon them and on ships you are carried.

targetTranslation: We sent (main verb of وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"

targetTranslation: Noah (as the object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

ayahEnglish: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"

ayahArabic: فَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَوْمِهِۦ مَا هٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُرِيدُ أَن يَتَفَضَّلَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَنزَلَ مَلٰٓئِكَةً مَّا سَمِعْنَا بِهٰذَا فِىٓ ءَابَآئِنَا ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: But the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, "This is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you; and if Allāh had willed [to send a messenger], He would have sent down angels. We have not heard of this among our forefathers.

ayahArabic: فَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَوْمِهِۦ مَا هٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُرِيدُ أَن يَتَفَضَّلَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَنزَلَ مَلٰٓئِكَةً مَّا سَمِعْنَا بِهٰذَا فِىٓ ءَابَآئِنَا ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: But the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, "This is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you; and if Allāh had willed [to send a messenger], He would have sent down angels. We have not heard of this among our forefathers.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌۢ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: He is not but a man possessed with madness, so wait concerning him for a time."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahEnglish: [Noah] said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahEnglish: [Noah] said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

ayahArabic: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ أَنِ ٱصْنَعِ ٱلْفُلْكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَوَحْيِنَا فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ فَٱسْلُكْ فِيهَا مِن كُلٍّ زَوْجَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ وَأَهْلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقَوْلُ مِنْهُمْ وَلَا تُخٰطِبْنِى فِى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ إِنَّهُم مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: So We inspired to him, "Construct the ship under Our observation and Our inspiration, and when Our command comes and the oven overflows, put into it [i.e., the ship] from each [creature] two mates and your family, except him for whom the decree [of destruction] has proceeded. And do not address Me concerning those who have wronged; indeed, they are to be drowned.

ayahEnglish: And when you have boarded the ship, you and those with you, then say, 'Praise to Allāh who has saved us from the wrongdoing people.'

ayahEnglish: And when you have boarded the ship, you and those with you, then say, 'Praise to Allāh who has saved us from the wrongdoing people.'

ayahEnglish: Indeed in that are signs, and indeed, We are ever testing [Our servants].

ayahEnglish: Then We produced after them a generation of others.

targetTranslation: a messenger (object of فَأَرْسَلْنَا - so we sent)
ayahArabic: فَأَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِمْ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent among them a messenger from themselves, [saying], "Worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِلِقَآءِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ وَأَتْرَفْنٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا مَا هٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يَأْكُلُ مِمَّا تَأْكُلُونَ مِنْهُ وَيَشْرَبُ مِمَّا تَشْرَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the eminent among his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter while We had given them luxury in the worldly life said, "This is not but a man like yourselves. He eats of that from which you eat and drinks of what you drink.

ayahEnglish: And if you should obey a man like yourselves, indeed, you would then be losers.

ayahEnglish: And if you should obey a man like yourselves, indeed, you would then be losers.

ayahArabic: أَيَعِدُكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ إِذَا مِتُّمْ وَكُنتُمْ تُرَابًا وَعِظٰمًا أَنَّكُم مُّخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: Does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones that you will be brought forth [once more]?

ayahEnglish: How far, how far, is that which you are promised.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَبْعُوثِينَ
ayahEnglish: It [i.e., life] is not but our worldly life - we die and live, but we will not be resurrected.

ayahEnglish: It [i.e., life] is not but our worldly life - we die and live, but we will not be resurrected.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا وَمَا نَحْنُ لَهُۥ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allāh, and we will not believe him."

ayahArabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا وَمَا نَحْنُ لَهُۥ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allāh, and we will not believe him."

ayahArabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا وَمَا نَحْنُ لَهُۥ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allāh, and we will not believe him."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

targetTranslation: help me! (command to Allah in رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

ayahArabic: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ لَّيُصْبِحُنَّ نٰدِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful."

ayahArabic: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ لَّيُصْبِحُنَّ نٰدِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful."

targetTranslation: regretful ones (predicate of يُصْبِحُنَّ - they will become)
ayahArabic: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ لَّيُصْبِحُنَّ نٰدِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful."

targetTranslation: as worthless scattered debris (object of فَجَعَلْنٰهُمْ/We made them)
ayahArabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَجَعَلْنٰهُمْ غُثَآءً فَبُعْدًا لِّلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: So the shriek seized them in truth, and We made them as [plant] stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people.

targetTranslation: we created/brought into being (acting on قُرُونًا/generations)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We produced after them other generations.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We produced after them other generations.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We produced after them other generations.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We produced after them other generations.

ayahArabic: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].

targetTranslation: a community (possessed by something mentioned after it)
ayahArabic: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].

ayahArabic: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].

ayahArabic: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].

targetTranslation: we sent (followed by رُسُلَنَا - our messengers)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتْرَا كُلَّ مَا جَآءَ أُمَّةً رَّسُولُهَا كَذَّبُوهُ فَأَتْبَعْنَا بَعْضَهُم بَعْضًا وَجَعَلْنٰهُمْ أَحَادِيثَ فَبُعْدًا لِّقَوْمٍ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another [to destruction], and We made them narrations. So away with a people who do not believe.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هٰرُونَ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هٰرُونَ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority

targetTranslation: Aaron (brother of Moses mentioned in أَخَاهُ)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هٰرُونَ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority

ayahEnglish: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority

ayahArabic: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people.

targetTranslation: a people (object of كَانُوا - they were)
ayahArabic: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people.

ayahArabic: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَالِينَ
ayahEnglish: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people.

targetTranslation: should we believe? (questioning belief in لِبَشَرَيْنِ - two humans)
ayahArabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لِبَشَرَيْنِ مِثْلِنَا وَقَوْمُهُمَا لَنَا عٰبِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude?"

ayahArabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لِبَشَرَيْنِ مِثْلِنَا وَقَوْمُهُمَا لَنَا عٰبِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude?"

ayahArabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لِبَشَرَيْنِ مِثْلِنَا وَقَوْمُهُمَا لَنَا عٰبِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude?"

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided.

targetTranslation: they follow the right path (in relation to لَعَلَّهُمْ - so that they)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.

targetTranslation: a sign/miracle (object of جَعَلْنَا - we made)
ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبٰتِ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صٰلِحًا إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Knowing.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبٰتِ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صٰلِحًا إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Knowing.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبٰتِ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صٰلِحًا إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Knowing.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبٰتِ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صٰلِحًا إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Knowing.

targetTranslation: your community/nation (referring to all the prophets' communities mentioned in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ هٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me."

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ هٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me."

targetTranslation: one (feminine, describing أُمَّة as the object)

ayahEnglish: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me."

targetTranslation: your Lord (referring to all those being addressed)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ هٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me."

targetTranslation: their matter/affair (object of تَقَطَّعُوا - they divided)
ayahArabic: فَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ زُبُرًا كُلُّ حِزْبٍۭ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ فَرِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they [i.e., the people] divided their religion among them into portions [i.e., sects] - each faction, in what it has, rejoicing.

targetTranslation: between them (describes how they divided their matter/affair)

ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ فِى غَمْرَتِهِمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: So leave them in their confusion for a time.

ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ فِى غَمْرَتِهِمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ

targetTranslation: Do they think/consider? (connected to أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم - that We extend to them)
ayahArabic: أَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم بِهِۦ مِن مَّالٍ وَبَنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children

targetTranslation: we extend/provide to them (referring to those who think their wealth means Allah approves of them)
ayahArabic: أَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم بِهِۦ مِن مَّالٍ وَبَنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children

ayahEnglish: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children

ayahArabic: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ بَل لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive.

targetTranslation: they sense/are aware (in لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ - they do not perceive)
ayahArabic: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ بَل لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِرَبِّهِمْ لَا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِرَبِّهِمْ لَا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْتُونَ مَآ ءَاتَوا۟ وَّقُلُوبُهُمْ وَجِلَةٌ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord -

targetTranslation: what/that which (refers to the things they give in ءَاتَوا۟)

ayahEnglish: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord -

ayahEnglish: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord -

ayahEnglish: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord -

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يُسٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سٰبِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يُسٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سٰبِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يُسٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سٰبِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein.

ayahArabic: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا وَلَدَيْنَا كِتٰبٌ يَنطِقُ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.

ayahArabic: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا وَلَدَيْنَا كِتٰبٌ يَنطِقُ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.

ayahEnglish: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.

ayahArabic: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا وَلَدَيْنَا كِتٰبٌ يَنطِقُ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.

targetTranslation: their hearts (subject of فِى غَمْرَةٍ - in confusion)
ayahArabic: بَلْ قُلُوبُهُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ مِّنْ هٰذَا وَلَهُمْ أَعْمٰلٌ مِّن دُونِ ذٰلِكَ هُمْ لَهَا عٰمِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

targetTranslation: in a state of being overwhelmed (describing قُلُوبُهُمْ - their hearts)

ayahEnglish: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

ayahEnglish: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

ayahEnglish: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

ayahEnglish: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

ayahEnglish: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

ayahEnglish: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِٱلْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allāh] for help.

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِٱلْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allāh] for help.

targetTranslation: their luxurious ones (who are being punished in العَذَاب)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِٱلْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allāh] for help.

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِٱلْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allāh] for help.

targetTranslation: they cry out in distress (when the punishment comes)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِٱلْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allāh] for help.

ayahArabic: لَا تَجْـَٔرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِنَّكُم مِّنَّا لَا تُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do not cry out today. Indeed, by Us you will not be helped.

targetTranslation: you (all) are helped (لَا - you will not be helped)
ayahArabic: لَا تَجْـَٔرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِنَّكُم مِّنَّا لَا تُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do not cry out today. Indeed, by Us you will not be helped.

ayahArabic: قَدْ كَانَتْ ءَايٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُمْ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْقٰبِكُمْ تَنكِصُونَ
ayahEnglish: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels.

ayahArabic: قَدْ كَانَتْ ءَايٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُمْ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْقٰبِكُمْ تَنكِصُونَ
ayahEnglish: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels.

targetTranslation: it is being recited (referring to ءَايٰتِى - My verses)

targetTranslation: you (all) are turning back (in fear) (from عَلَىٰٓ أَعْقٰبِكُمْ - on your heels)

ayahEnglish: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels.

ayahArabic: مُسْتَكْبِرِينَ بِهِۦ سٰمِرًا تَهْجُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: In arrogance regarding it, conversing by night, speaking evil.

targetTranslation: spending time talking at night (describing their state)
ayahArabic: مُسْتَكْبِرِينَ بِهِۦ سٰمِرًا تَهْجُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: In arrogance regarding it, conversing by night, speaking evil.

ayahArabic: مُسْتَكْبِرِينَ بِهِۦ سٰمِرًا تَهْجُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: In arrogance regarding it, conversing by night, speaking evil.

targetTranslation: So did they not...? (referring to يَدَّبَّرُوا۟ - they ponder)
ayahArabic: أَفَلَمْ يَدَّبَّرُوا۟ ٱلْقَوْلَ أَمْ جَآءَهُم مَّا لَمْ يَأْتِ ءَابَآءَهُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then have they not reflected over the word [i.e., the Qur’ān], or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers?

ayahArabic: أَفَلَمْ يَدَّبَّرُوا۟ ٱلْقَوْلَ أَمْ جَآءَهُم مَّا لَمْ يَأْتِ ءَابَآءَهُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

ayahEnglish: Then have they not reflected over the word [i.e., the Qur’ān], or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers?

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَمْ يَعْرِفُوا۟ رَسُولَهُمْ فَهُمْ لَهُۥ مُنكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging?

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَمْ يَعْرِفُوا۟ رَسُولَهُمْ فَهُمْ لَهُۥ مُنكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging?

targetTranslation: those who reject (referring to the disbelievers in فَهُمْ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ لَمْ يَعْرِفُوا۟ رَسُولَهُمْ فَهُمْ لَهُۥ مُنكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging?

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌۢ بَلْ جَآءَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كٰرِهُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "In him is madness"? Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌۢ بَلْ جَآءَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كٰرِهُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "In him is madness"? Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌۢ بَلْ جَآءَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كٰرِهُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "In him is madness"? Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.

targetTranslation: ones who hate/dislike (describes أكثرهم - most of them)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌۢ بَلْ جَآءَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كٰرِهُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "In him is madness"? Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.

ayahArabic: وَلَوِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْحَقُّ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ لَفَسَدَتِ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهِنَّ بَلْ أَتَيْنٰهُم بِذِكْرِهِمْ فَهُمْ عَن ذِكْرِهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahEnglish: But if the Truth [i.e., Allāh] had followed their inclinations, the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined. Rather, We have brought them their message, but they, from their message, are turning away.

ayahArabic: وَلَوِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْحَقُّ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ لَفَسَدَتِ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهِنَّ بَلْ أَتَيْنٰهُم بِذِكْرِهِمْ فَهُمْ عَن ذِكْرِهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ

ayahEnglish: But if the Truth [i.e., Allāh] had followed their inclinations, the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined. Rather, We have brought them their message, but they, from their message, are turning away.

targetTranslation: you ask them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ خَرْجًا فَخَرَاجُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّازِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask them for payment? But the reward of your Lord is best, and He is the best of providers.

targetTranslation: a path (being directed to in إِلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, you invite them to a straight path.

targetTranslation: a straight (path being called to in إِلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, you invite them to a straight path.

targetTranslation: those who (plural, referring to those who don't believe in the Hereafter)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ عَنِ ٱلصِّرٰطِ لَنٰكِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: But indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from the path.

targetTranslation: they believe/have faith (in الْءَاخِرَةِ - the Hereafter)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ عَنِ ٱلصِّرٰطِ لَنٰكِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: But indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from the path.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ رَحِمْنٰهُمْ وَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِم مِّن ضُرٍّ لَّلَجُّوا۟ فِى طُغْيٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.

targetTranslation: that which (referring to the harm/affliction mentioned in ضُرٍّ)
ayahArabic: وَلَوْ رَحِمْنٰهُمْ وَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِم مِّن ضُرٍّ لَّلَجُّوا۟ فِى طُغْيٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.

ayahEnglish: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ رَحِمْنٰهُمْ وَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِم مِّن ضُرٍّ لَّلَجُّوا۟ فِى طُغْيٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَخَذْنٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ فَمَا ٱسْتَكَانُوا۟ لِرَبِّهِمْ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَخَذْنٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ فَمَا ٱسْتَكَانُوا۟ لِرَبِّهِمْ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَخَذْنٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ فَمَا ٱسْتَكَانُوا۟ لِرَبِّهِمْ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]

targetTranslation: suddenly/immediately (shows هُمْ/they become in despair right after)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا ذَا عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ إِذَا هُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until when We have opened before them a door of severe punishment, immediately they will be therein in despair.

ayahEnglish: And it is He who produced for you hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]; little are you grateful.

ayahEnglish: And it is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ وَلَهُ ٱخْتِلٰفُ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا هٰذَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

ayahEnglish: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and indeed they are liars.

ayahArabic: مَا ٱتَّخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِن وَلَدٍ وَمَا كَانَ مَعَهُۥ مِنْ إِلٰهٍ إِذًا لَّذَهَبَ كُلُّ إِلٰهٍۭ بِمَا خَلَقَ وَلَعَلَا بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ سُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. [If there had been], then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have [sought to] overcome others. Exalted is Allāh above what they describe [concerning Him].

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ لَبِثْنَا يَوْمًا أَوْ بَعْضَ يَوْمٍ فَسْـَٔلِ ٱلْعَآدِّينَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate."

targetTranslation: a part of (possessed by يَوْمٍ - day)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ لَبِثْنَا يَوْمًا أَوْ بَعْضَ يَوْمٍ فَسْـَٔلِ ٱلْعَآدِّينَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate."

targetTranslation: a day (acted on by لَبِثْنَا - we remained)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ لَبِثْنَا يَوْمًا أَوْ بَعْضَ يَوْمٍ فَسْـَٔلِ ٱلْعَآدِّينَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate."

ayahArabic: قٰلَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.

ayahArabic: قٰلَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.

ayahArabic: قٰلَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.

ayahArabic: قٰلَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.

ayahArabic: قٰلَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.

targetTranslation: So did you all think/suppose? (connecting to أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ عَبَثًا)
ayahArabic: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?"

ayahArabic: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?"

ayahArabic: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?"

ayahArabic: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?"

ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahEnglish: So exalted is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.

ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahEnglish: So exalted is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.

targetTranslation: He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahEnglish: So exalted is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.

targetTranslation: The Lord (subject of فَتَعٰلَى - so exalted is)
ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahEnglish: So exalted is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ لَا بُرْهٰنَ لَهُۥ بِهِۦ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whoever invokes besides Allāh another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ لَا بُرْهٰنَ لَهُۥ بِهِۦ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ

targetTranslation: O my Lord! (calling upon for ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ - forgive and have mercy)
ayahArabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And, [O Muḥammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful."

targetTranslation: forgive! (command to one person) (connected to رَّبِّ - O Lord)
ayahArabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And, [O Muḥammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful."

targetTranslation: best (of الرَّاحِمِينَ - those who show mercy)
ayahArabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And, [O Muḥammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful."
